ticket.subject: Cannot sign in after phone replacement
ticket.body: I replaced my phone and no longer have the MFA app. I cannot get into the dashboard and my work is blocked.

notes: Access is blocked because MFA is unavailable.

ticket.subject: Enterprise admin stuck in SSO login loop
ticket.body: Our admin signs in through SSO but gets sent back to the login page every time. They cannot access workspace settings.

notes: High-value account access issue blocks an admin workflow.

ticket.subject: New employee did not receive invite
ticket.body: Can you resend the workspace invite for a new teammate? They checked spam and still do not see it.

notes: Common invite issue with no high-risk signals.

ticket.subject: Password reset link expired
ticket.body: One user tried the password reset email after lunch and the link says it expired. Please send a fresh one.

notes: Single-user credential support request.

ticket.subject: Team owner locked out and escalating
ticket.body: Our team owner is locked out before a customer review. Please escalate because leadership is waiting on access.

notes: Blocked account access plus explicit escalation wording.

ticket.subject: Refund duplicate annual charge
ticket.body: We were charged twice for our annual renewal. Please refund the duplicate payment.

notes: Refund request should be reviewed by billing operations.

ticket.subject: Disputed charge may become chargeback
ticket.body: There is a disputed charge on our card and finance may file a chargeback if we cannot resolve it today.

notes: Disputed charge and chargeback wording make it billing-sensitive.

ticket.subject: Cancel trial before renewal
ticket.body: Please cancel our trial before it renews next week. We do not want the subscription to convert.

notes: Cancellation request needs billing review.

ticket.subject: Need invoice copy and PO update
ticket.body: Can you send a copy of invoice INV-2381 and update the purchase order number for our records?

notes: Routine invoice administration request.

ticket.subject: Payment failed on renewal
ticket.body: The renewal payment failed because our card expired. Where can we update the payment method?

notes: Normal payment update request with no refund or dispute.

ticket.subject: CSV export fails with 502
ticket.body: When I click Export CSV, the download fails with a 502 error. It happens every time for the project report.

notes: Reproducible product failure for engineering triage.

ticket.subject: Monthly report totals are wrong
ticket.body: The totals in the monthly report are wrong for all projects. Finance is using this report today.

notes: Understated wording but high business impact.

ticket.subject: Regression after latest release
ticket.body: After yesterday's release, saved filters apply the wrong status across multiple projects. It worked before.

notes: Regression affecting multiple projects at an enterprise account.

ticket.subject: Button alignment looks off
ticket.body: The Save button is one pixel lower than the Cancel button on the settings page. Everything still works.

notes: Cosmetic issue with low impact.

ticket.subject: API validation error on create request
ticket.body: Our integration receives a validation error every time it sends a valid create request with the documented payload.

notes: Likely product bug in API validation.

ticket.subject: Application down for everyone
ticket.body: The application is down for everyone on our account. Nobody can load the login page.

notes: Broad outage signal.

ticket.subject: Login page returns 503
ticket.body: All users get a 503 Service Unavailable page when they try to sign in.

notes: Availability issue affects all users.

ticket.subject: Severe latency for support team
ticket.body: Pages take 20 to 30 seconds to load and our whole support team is affected during business hours.

notes: Severe degradation with broad team impact.

ticket.subject: Admin page slightly slow sometimes
ticket.body: The admin page is a little slow sometimes, but all actions eventually complete and no users are blocked.

notes: Low-impact performance complaint.

ticket.subject: Intermittent timeout for one user
ticket.body: One user sees an intermittent timeout when opening large reports. Other users can access the same reports.

notes: Availability signal is limited to one user.

ticket.subject: Configure SAML SSO
ticket.body: Can someone help us configure SAML SSO for our workspace before we invite the rest of the team?

notes: Configuration support request.

ticket.subject: Webhook signing secret setup
ticket.body: How do I configure the webhook signing secret for our staging environment?

notes: Webhook setup guidance.

ticket.subject: API key permission question
ticket.body: Our staging API key cannot create test records. Which permission should we enable?

notes: Permissions troubleshooting without clear product defect.

ticket.subject: Salesforce import field mapping
ticket.body: Our Salesforce import rejects one custom field mapping. I am not sure which field type is supported.

notes: Integration troubleshooting request.

ticket.subject: URGENT dashboard configuration question
ticket.body: This is urgent for our internal demo, but I only need to know how to configure dashboard filters for a saved view.

notes: Emotional urgency with normal support impact.

ticket.subject: Former employee still has access
ticket.body: A user who left the company still appears to have access to reports after their account was disabled.

notes: Possible access-control risk.

ticket.subject: GDPR deletion request
ticket.body: Please delete all personal data for user jane@example.com under GDPR.

notes: Privacy request requiring policy-sensitive handling.

ticket.subject: Data exported to wrong customer
ticket.body: A scheduled export appears to have sent one customer's report to another customer. The file contained personal data.

notes: Potential data exposure with cross-customer impact.

ticket.subject: Suspicious login activity
ticket.body: We see suspicious login attempts from a country where we do not operate. Can security review the account?

notes: Security investigation request.

ticket.subject: DPA and privacy handling question
ticket.body: Our legal team is reviewing the DPA and wants to confirm how personal data is handled for archived users.

notes: Privacy-sensitive question without immediate incident impact.

ticket.subject: Dark mode request
ticket.body: Can you add dark mode to the admin dashboard?

notes: Low-risk product enhancement request.

ticket.subject: Schedule weekly dashboard emails
ticket.body: It would be helpful if dashboards could be scheduled as weekly email reports.

notes: Enhancement idea for dashboards.

ticket.subject: Bulk user import enhancement
ticket.body: We would like a bulk user import option from CSV so onboarding large teams is faster.

notes: Product enhancement request.

ticket.subject: Improve dashboard layout controls
ticket.body: Please improve the dashboard layout so widgets can snap to a grid.

notes: Layout improvement suggestion.

ticket.subject: URGENT color customization request
ticket.body: URGENT: our team really needs custom chart colors for a presentation, but the current colors still work.

notes: Emotional urgency with low actual impact.

ticket.subject: Need help
ticket.body: Please call me back.

notes: Too little detail to classify safely.

ticket.subject: Your website is bad
ticket.body: Nothing else to add.

notes: Vague complaint without a support signal.

ticket.subject: Question about my account
ticket.body: I have a question about my account but I do not know which details matter.

notes: Mentions account but lacks actionable detail.

ticket.subject: Billing, login, and errors
ticket.body: We have billing questions, login trouble, and some errors, but I need to gather examples before explaining.

notes: Multiple possible categories without enough specifics.

ticket.subject: Following up
ticket.body: Following up on the thing we discussed last week. Can you check it?

notes: Refers to missing prior context.
